description: Create a content slide on European private equity M&A outlook with a vertical bar chart and a right-hand bullet sidebar, showing expected 2019 transaction changes versus 2018.

header.kicker: Development of the European private equity market
header.headline: The outlook for M&A transactions with PE involvement has changed: More PE professionals expect a decline in numbers
header.sub:
M&A transactions with PE involvement – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]
"What change do you expect to see in 2019 regarding the number of completed M&A transactions with PE involvement?"

main.title: % of responses [only one response per category possible]

items.text: Compared to last year's expectations, PE professionals have become less optimistic in their expectations for 2019 after a successful 2018 and 2017
For the first time in several years, more respondents expect the number of M&A transactions with PE involvement to decrease (48%) rather than increase (31%)
